regime.note: AFTER-HOURS = the morning 'shakeout holding' thesis was CONFIRMED by the close. The de-risk resolved UP intraday: QQQ (708.24→711.44), VGT (114.80→115.47) and SPMO (149.62→150.57) all closed GREEN off the morning read, 5-day momentum improved across the whole complex (still negative but less so), VGT's 21-day flipped POSITIVE, and VIX finished flat-and-low (~16.9). The index-down/VIX-down morning fingerprint of dealer-dampened orderly selling played out as designed — the crowd that de-risked into the pre-market pop got squeezed back as tech stabilized. The actionable setup now FLIPS: XLK relative-strength healed a third straight read (1m RS −0.59, from −6.15 pre-market) while every defensive leader's RS compressed — the leadership rotation is quietly reversing toward tech/momentum. NOT an all-clear: XLK is still Weakening (RS <0), MSFT's 21-day is still −8.0, crude is carried ~$74 keeping the CPI tail live, and 7/9 claims + a 30y auction sit overnight. Falsifiers: VIX term structure inverting to backwardation (IVTS >1.0); XLK 1m RS rolling back below its morning −0.96; a hot CPI (7/14). The read leans 'shakeout resolved up, rotation turning back to tech' over 'dead-cat bounce'.

psychology.read: REGIME: an orderly de-risk that RESOLVED UP — the shakeout is over at the margin, not deepening. NAME it: a controlled, dealer-dampened (positive-gamma) de-risk that mean-reverted higher into the close — QQQ/VGT/SPMO all finished GREEN off the morning read, 5-day momentum improved across the complex, VGT's 21-day flipped positive, and VIX closed flat-and-low (16.78→16.9). The morning index-down/VIX-down fingerprint played out: the crowd that de-risked into the pre-market pop got squeezed back as tech stabilized. The term structure is carried CONTANGO (IVTS ~0.85), consistent with a low, stable close. CROWD POSTURE: complacency is refilling but the rotation is quietly TURNING — the same defensive/financials leadership (XLV/XLP/XLU + XLF) is still labelled 'Leading' but every leader's RS compressed a THIRD run while XLK relative-strength healed a third straight read (1m −6.15 pre-market → −0.59 now). This is a crowd unwinding its defensive hedge and creeping back toward tech/momentum, without yet confirming it (XLK RS still <0, MSFT still the −8.0 laggard). Sell-the-news risk persists into the 7/29 MSFT/FOMC collision. FALSIFIERS: (1) VIX term structure inverting to BACKWARDATION (IVTS >1.0) = the orderly read breaks into genuine risk-off; (2) XLK 1m RS rolling back below its −0.96 morning read = the recovery was a dead-cat bounce; (3) a hot June CPI (7/14) or a 30y auction tail (7/9) re-firing the tech de-rate; (4) crude mean-reverting under $70 would REMOVE the headline-CPI tail (a bullish falsifier of the inflation worry).

psychology.tiltOnProbabilities: CPI (7/14) odds still shaded so hot+in-line > cool on the carried oil (headline) bias — but the reflexive read shifted: with the crowd now UNWINDING its defensive hedge and creeping back to tech, a cool print meets a market already leaning long = a more potent squeeze than earlier this week, while a hot print is the clean negater of the recovery thesis. 7/9 claims/30y auction kept 55% in-line as the base case that lets the recovery build, with the 30y tail the underrated 30% risk. OPEX pin nudged back UP 0.52→0.55 as VIX closed low-and-flat (positive-gamma-friendly). MSFT miss shaded slightly heavier than the (stale) option-implied for sell-the-news asymmetry into the 7/29 FOMC collision. All labeled estimates seeded from STALE options (Jul-6) / unverified consensus / carried crude — re-seed live.

The all-clear is the 5-day crossing >0 + a 50-day reclaim, now within reach; XLK RS (−0.59, healing) is the confirming rotation tell.

experimental.title: Leadership-rotation reversal detector: defensive-RS decay + lagging-group-RS recovery crossover (idea)
experimental.note: Method: track the SPREAD between the average 1m RS of the current Leading defensives (XLV/XLP/XLU/XLF) and the deepest Lagging growth group (XLK) run-over-run; flag a 'rotation reversal' when the defensive spread COMPRESSES for N consecutive reads WHILE the lagging group's RS climbs toward a 0 cross (this run: defensives compressed 3 runs — XLV +5.9→+5.2, XLF +4.7→+4.2 — while XLK RS healed −6.15→−0.59). Base-rate the forward outcome: does the crossover precede a durable leadership handoff or a failed head-fake? Inputs: sector daily bars + the RRG-lite RS-momentum already in the Tier-A slice. No owning tool watches the two-sided crossover today; it drove this run's 'rotate back to tech' read. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Intraday shakeout-resolution tracker: does index-down/VIX-down mean-revert UP by the close? (idea)
experimental.note: Method: for sessions flagged index-down/VIX-down at a mid-session checkpoint (the dealer-dampening fingerprint), measure the close-vs-checkpoint drift and tag 'resolved up' when the tape recovers green (this run: QQQ 708.24 morning → 711.44 close, VIX 16.78→16.9). Build the base rate: how often does the positive-gamma divergence actually mean-revert higher into the bell vs bleed further? Overlay the SPY dealer-gamma flip sign. Inputs: SPX + ^VIX intraday checkpoints (have VIX at each window), SPY gamma flip from the gamma lab. Extends the prior vol-spot divergence idea with an intraday resolution test that this run's recovery validated. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: VIX term-structure regime flag: contango→backwardation cross (idea)
experimental.note: Method: track IVTS = VIX/VIX3M (and VIX9D/VIX) daily; flag the cross of IVTS through 1.0 (contango→backwardation) as a regime-change trigger, with day-count of the current regime and a base-rate study of forward SPX returns/realized-vol after each cross. This run's whole read hinges on the curve STAYING in contango (IVTS ~0.85 carried); backwardation is the named falsifier. Inputs: ^VIX/^VIX9D/^VIX3M series (add VIX9D/3M to rlData). No owning tool watches the curve cross today. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Rate-driven rotation gauge: XLK-vs-XLF RS overlaid on the 10y yield (idea)
experimental.note: Method: plot XLK/XLF (and XLK/XLV) relative-strength ratio against the 10y Treasury yield and its 5/20-day change; regress sector RS-momentum on d(10y) to quantify how rate-sensitive the current leadership rotation is, and flag when the correlation breaks (rotation losing its rate driver = tech re-entry — which XLK's 3-read RS heal this run signals). Inputs: XLK/XLF/XLV daily bars (have), ^TNX or 10y yield series (need to add to rlData), with the 7/9 30y auction as a live test. This run's thesis is explicitly rate+oil-driven — no owning tool ties sector RS to yields today. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Crude/geopolitical shock → energy RRG divergence monitor (idea)
experimental.note: Method: flag when a sector is a top daily performer while its trailing RRG cell is deeply Lagging (XLE on the ~$74 crude carry yet 1m RS −4.2 / 3m −20.3) — a one-day event vs trend divergence — then track whether the pop leads the RS (trend turn) or fades (spike). Overlay WTI level + its 5/20-day change on XLE relative-strength; trigger 'trend-follow' only when crude HOLDS a level AND 1m RS crosses >0. Inputs: XLE + sector daily bars (have), CL/WTI series (need to add). Recurs whenever a geopolitical oil move hits a lagging energy tape and stays the cleanest CPI-tail hedge. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Double-catalyst vol event-study: FOMC-day + mega-cap earnings collision (idea)
experimental.note: Method: event-study base rates for days when an FOMC decision and a top-10 S&P name's earnings land together (Jul 29 = FOMC + MSFT) — measure realized-vs-implied vol, average |move|, and next-day drift vs single-catalyst days. Inputs: historical FOMC dates + mega-cap earnings dates + SPX/QQQ realized vol + straddle-implied. Quantifies the compounding this run flags qualitatively. Not yet built; promote if the pattern recurs across quarters.
